meta.based_on: bufab.com live site analysis + original draft guidelines

constraints: header is always the topmost element
hero is always the first content section
footer is always the last element
every section must have a named business purpose
no section exists for visual decoration only
sections alternate between background-white and background-surface-alt
no more than two consecutive sections with the same background

scroll_behavior.background: always #0D3349 — no color change on scroll
scroll_behavior.note: Header background does NOT change to white on scroll. Primary color is maintained at all scroll positions.

rules: background: color.primary (#0D3349) — fixed, does not change on scroll
logo: left-aligned, white variant always (background never changes)
primary-navigation: horizontal, right-aligned, no hamburger on desktop
navigation items: 15px, weight 500, color white, with dropdown support
cta-button: 'Contact us', accent orange (#E8610A), right-aligned, border-radius 0px
height: 64px
position: sticky, top: 0, z-index: 100
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1) — subtle separator on scroll
header.implementation_note: Use a single CSS rule: `header { background: #0D3349; position: sticky; top: 0; }`. Do NOT add scroll listeners that swap background color. If a previous implementation used JavaScript to toggle a class on scroll (e.g. .scrolled, .white-header), remove it entirely.

hero.purpose: Primary brand statement and single conversion point

field_rules.eyebrow: optional | uppercase | 12px | weight 500 | letter-spacing 0.05em | color text-secondary
field_rules.title: required | H1 | max 2 lines | 40-48px | weight 600 | color white
field_rules.body: required | 2-3 sentences | 17px | weight 400 | color rgba(255,255,255,0.85) | max-width 560px
field_rules.cta: required | single button only | accent orange | label max 4 words

layout_rules: dark overlay on background image (rgba 0,0,0,0.45 min)
NO subtitle field — use body paragraph instead
NO hero without a background image

layout.direction: text-left image-right OR text-right image-left (alternate between instances)

rules: no card or container wrapping either element
H2 heading: 28-32px, weight 600
body: 2-4 sentences, 16px
text-link (not button): arrow → prefix, color primary, underline on hover
image: real photography or technical SVG diagram only
image aspect ratio: 4:3 or 16:9
no border radius on image
no drop shadow on image
section-heading: H2, left-aligned or centered, above columns
column label: 16-18px, weight 600, color text-primary
column description: 15px, weight 400, color text-secondary
max 4 columns per row
separator is a thin vertical line, not spacing or card boundaries

diagram-section.purpose: Illustrate a process, supply chain, or framework
rules: diagram must be SVG or high-res technical illustration
bullet list: max 4 items, action-oriented phrasing (verb + noun)
no decorative icons in bullets — plain list markers only
text-link CTA below list
background: alternate surface-alt if adjacent section is white

layout.tile_style: image with text overlay OR image above text

rules: ONLY section type where tile/card layout is permitted
industry-name: 15px, weight 600
short-description: 13px, weight 400, optional
image: real photography of relevant industry context
no border radius greater than 2px on tiles
no heavy shadow on tiles — subtle 1px border acceptable

insights-list.purpose: Surface editorial content and demonstrate thought leadership

layout.style: plain text list — NO cards, NO thumbnails, NO dates visible

rules: article-title: H3 weight (18-20px, weight 600), plain link, underline on hover
NO thumbnail images in list view
NO card backgrounds per article
explore-all-link: text link, not button
section-intro: optional, 1-2 sentences, 15px

text-cta-block.purpose: Mid-page conversion prompt or section transition
rules: statement: 1 sentence, 20-24px, weight 500
single CTA button, accent orange
no image
no heading hierarchy — this is a punctuation section, not a feature section
padding: 48px vertical
background: color.primary (#0D3349)
text: white, 13px, weight 400
column headings: 13px, weight 600, uppercase, color rgba(255,255,255,0.6)
4-column layout on desktop, stacked on mobile
bottom bar: thin top border, 11px text, muted
logo: white variant, top-left of footer or above columns
no decorative elements

typography.no_web_fonts: intentional — use system stack for speed and authenticity

spacing.note: Do NOT use 80-120px section padding — that is SaaS/startup spacing. 64px is the maximum.

borders_and_radius.no_card_borders: cards not used in core content sections

acceptable_technical: SVG process diagrams (supply chain wheels, flow diagrams)

strict_constraints: no bright or saturated colors outside accent
no hero without a background image
no card layouts outside industries-grid section
no excessive whitespace — section padding max 64px
no box shadows with blur greater than 8px
no web fonts — use system font stack only
final_check: Does it look like a corporate industrial company, not a tech startup?
Is content the main focus, not UI decoration?
Are colors restricted to the defined token set?
Is every section serving a named business purpose?
Is all photography real industrial context (or approved CC0 fallback)?
Is the hero left-aligned with a single orange CTA?
Are cards absent from all non-grid sections?
Is the header always dark blue (#0D3349) regardless of scroll position?
Is the footer dark-background with 4-column layout?
